title: Creatopia Infinity
body:
### Creatopia Infinity now has Create 6.0!
Creatopia Infinity is an Create-Focused Modpack for Minecraft that has 600+ Lines of KubeJS Code!
This modpack englobes Ad Astra, Applied Energistics and Create!
Creatopia Infinity has (Some) Quests, Increased difficulty and Multiplayer Support!

The **most recent version** of this pack has the following mods:
1. Ad Astra ([Found here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra))
2. Ad Astra: Planets+ ([Found Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/planetsplus))
3. Applied Energistics ([Found Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2))
